title: Creative Brief Translator
problem_or_desire: The information gap between high-level client conceptual needs and individual production brief quality.
core_concept: Agents that 'shadow' planning calls to autonomously document technical requirements for contractors.
proposed_approach: Agent analyzes collaborative whiteboard output and transcript data to fill structured standardized agency brief templates.
prototype_scope: Template ingestion for graphic design asset requests derived from transcribed meetings.

title: BotanicTrack
problem_or_desire: Difficulty tracking plant growth performance compared to recommended care
proposed_approach: A simple tracker where users log plant height and see their own progress over time.
prototype_scope: A form to log height and a line graph to visualize it. | Build a log form; Implement a charting library; Display the user's own data

title: The Community Preservative Co-op
problem_or_desire: Waste of fresh aromatics and stock perishables leading to lost inventory and cooking motivation
proposed_approach: A local service that picks up bulk produce and returns it prepped for the freezer.
prototype_scope: Process 10 bags of produce for 5 households over one week. | Define preservation methods (blanching, chopping); Recruit 5 households; Execute pickup and processing; Gather feedback on convenience

title: Remote Team Ritualizer
problem_or_desire: Lack of social cohesion and shared culture in fully remote environments.
core_concept: Automated, low-friction asynchronous team bonding activities.
proposed_approach: A web app that prompts team members with daily non-work questions and visualizes the collective responses.
prototype_scope: A single-question daily prompt interface with a shared wall for viewing team answers.

title: Shadow Script
problem_or_desire: Stalled imagination due to lack of character stakes
core_concept: Reverse Choose-Your-Own-Adventure where the player creates obstacles for an AI.
proposed_approach: A narrative game where the player chooses obstacles for a pre-scripted character, and the game displays the resulting outcome.
prototype_scope: Two scripted chapters with one 'conflict injection' scene that branches into two possible outcomes. | Write two chapters and two outcomes; Implement basic branching logic; Build simple UI for choice selection

title: Sensory-Blind Catering Experiences
target_user: Office event organizers targeting high social engagement
problem_or_desire: Traditional group events often focus too heavily on conversation distractants over menu intentionality
core_concept: Blind-dining optimized menus structured entirely on sequential textural mouth-feel gradients
proposed_approach: Hosting managed catering that obscures visuals during the process to ensure 100% focus on tasting menus
prototype_scope: Catering session of six courses involving twenty participants aimed at qualitative social memory-mapping

title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
core_concept: Rapid-response repair service using modular swaps to minimize downtime.
proposed_approach: A repair service that stocks common replacement parts for popular machines to offer faster turnaround times than traditional vendors.
prototype_scope: A pilot repair service for 5 local cafes focusing on one common machine brand. | Identify 5 cafes using the same machine brand.; Stock common parts for that brand.; Offer a 24-hour repair guarantee for those cafes.

title: Personalized Reading List Curator
problem_or_desire: Difficulty finding high-quality, non-fiction books relevant to specific learning goals.
core_concept: A collaborative filtering engine for curated reading paths.
proposed_approach: A web app where users define a learning goal and receive a sequenced list of books recommended by experts.
prototype_scope: A goal-selection interface that outputs a static, curated list of five books.

title: Social Media Engagement Agent
problem_or_desire: Difficulty maintaining consistent engagement with community members across multiple platforms.
core_concept: An agent that identifies high-value comments or questions and drafts personalized, on-brand responses for human review.
proposed_approach: Sentiment analysis and intent classification to prioritize interactions that require human attention.
prototype_scope: A tool that filters 50 social media comments and suggests responses for the 5 most urgent ones.

title: Sleep Sentinel
target_user: Light sleepers suffering from screen light overstimulation
problem_or_desire: Late night fidgeting and phone reliance impacting transition to REM cycles
core_concept: Audio-only tactical adventure navigable through binary haptic pulses and voice commands while keeping the eyes fully closed (phone screen brightness reduced to black).
proposed_approach: Binaural storytelling using spatial audio to indicate direction; user must verbally command left, right, or push maneuvers to solve escape puzzles while lying in darkness.
prototype_scope: Calibration of gyroscope-to-rotation mapping for selecting directions within a simple 3x3 audio maze.
